name: 破土而出
summary: 从零到研究预览，确立 AI 编程助手新范式
summary_en: From zero to research preview, establishing a new paradigm for AI coding assistants

name: 工具化
summary: 从研究预览到正式产品，建立方法论和生态基础
summary_en: From research preview to production product, building methodology and ecosystem foundations

name: 生态扩张
summary: 从单一工具到多 IDE 生态，2.0 大版本重构
summary_en: From a single tool to a multi-IDE ecosystem, with the 2.0 major rewrite

name: 平台化
summary: $1B ARR 里程碑、Bun 收购、Cowork 扩圈、插件生态
summary_en: $1B ARR milestone, Bun acquisition, Cowork launch, and plugin ecosystem

name: 自主化
summary: 1M 上下文、安全扫描、无人值守运行能力
summary_en: 1M context window, security scanning, and unattended operation capabilities
